text.title: QA Flaky Test Root-Cause Taxonomy Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) for the rubric artefact this methodology produces. Validator in scripts/validate-qa-flaky-test-root-cause-taxonomy.py enforces required keys, enum bounds, and pattern constraints.

section.title: Schema

example.note: All required keys present; enums and patterns satisfied.
Forbidden traits: categories not in the 8-enum; missing detectors or fix_family; default_unknown_window_days>7; mask_window_days>30.
